metadata.title: TTPortal – Find Your Table. Track Your Game.
metadata.description: The companion app for table tennis players. Discover venues, check in, log your sessions, join events, and connect with players in your city.

footer.tagline: The table tennis companion. Find tables, log sessions, and meet players near you.

cta.trusted: Trusted by table tennis players across Romania

hero.subtitle: Discover table tennis venues, check in at your favourite clubs, log every session, and connect with players around you — all in one place.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: Everything a table tennis player needs,
features.description: From finding a place to play to tracking every rally you log, TTPortal keeps your table tennis life organized.
features.feature1Description: Browse a map of table tennis clubs and public tables across your city. See opening hours, reviews, and number of tables before you go.
features.feature1Bullet1: Interactive map with every known venue
features.feature1Bullet2: Filter by city, table count, open now, or rating
features.feature1Bullet3: Real reviews and photos from other players
features.feature2Description: A single tap logs that you played. Build a history of every session, see how often you visit each venue, and watch your play time add up.
features.feature2Bullet3: Full play history across all your venues
features.feature3Description: Schedule matches with friends, create open events for your club, or join recurring sessions. Manage attendance, invites, and reminders in one place.
features.feature3Bullet2: Invite friends or make it public
features.feature4Description: Climb the city leaderboards by logging sessions and attending events. Take on monthly challenges and earn badges for consistency.
features.feature4Bullet3: Earn badges as you hit milestones
features.feature5Description: Rate venues on what actually matters — table condition, lighting, pricing, crowd. Help other players find the best spot to play.
features.feature5Bullet2: Add photos of the venue and the tables
features.feature5Bullet3: See reviewer play history for context
features.feature6Description: Keep a log of the rubbers, blades, and balls you play with. Switch setups, note what worked, and share your loadout with friends.
features.feature6Bullet2: History of every setup you've tried
features.feature7Description: Add friends, see who plays where, and discover players at your level. Never show up to an empty table again.
features.feature7Bullet1: Add friends and follow their check-ins
features.feature7Bullet2: See who's active at nearby venues
features.feature7Bullet3: Match with players at your level

secondaryFeatures.title: And much more.
secondaryFeatures.description: Every feature built for the way table tennis players actually play.
secondaryFeatures.friendManagementDesc: Build your circle of playing partners. Add friends, accept invites, and see who's at the table tonight.
secondaryFeatures.smartNotificationsDesc: Get notified about friends checking in, event reminders, challenge progress, and new reviews on your favourite venues.
secondaryFeatures.eventAnalyticsDesc: Claimed venues get a full analytics dashboard — check-ins, peak hours, repeat visitors, and review trends.
secondaryFeatures.privacyFirstDesc: Your play history is yours. Data is never sold. Venues only see aggregated, anonymized insights.
secondaryFeatures.worksEverywhereDesc: Native on iOS and Android. Offline-first check-ins sync when you're back online.
secondaryFeatures.realTimeSyncDesc: Events, check-ins, and leaderboards update instantly for everyone in the session.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: Up and playing in 3 steps.
howItWorks.description: Less setup than unfolding a table.
howItWorks.step1Description: Open the map, pick a club or public table near you, and see what's there — hours, reviews, who's playing.
howItWorks.step2Description: One tap logs the session. Your play history, streaks, and city leaderboard updates automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: Add friends, join events, take on monthly challenges. Table tennis is better together.

landingCta.title: Your next session
landingCta.subtitle: Download TTPortal and find a table tonight.

getStartedModal.title: Get Started with TTPortal
getStartedModal.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to use TTPortal.
getStartedModal.webDescription: Use TTPortal instantly in your web browser.
getStartedModal.apkDescription: Get the Android app (APK) for the best experience.

privacy.metaDescription: How TTPortal handles your personal data, who we share it with, and what rights you have under the GDPR.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TTPortal ("we", "us") makes a service for table tennis players. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, why we collect it, who we share it with, and what rights you have. We keep data collection to the minimum needed for the app to work.
privacy.collectBody1: When you create an account, we collect the information you provide: your email address and display name. If you sign in with Google or Apple, we receive your email address and (optionally) your name and profile photo from those providers.
privacy.collectBody2: While you use the app, we store the content you create: venue reviews, check-ins, session logs, friends, events you organize or attend, and equipment you log. Our servers also keep technical logs (IP address, browser type, request timestamps) for security and debugging, retained for up to 90 days.
privacy.purposesBody1: We use your data to provide the service: signing you in, showing your sessions and reviews, helping you find friends and venues, and protecting the service from abuse. We do not sell your personal data and we do not use it for advertising or third-party marketing.
privacy.legalBasesBody1: We process your data on these legal bases: (a) contract — to deliver the service you signed up for; (b) legitimate interest — to keep the service secure and prevent abuse; (c) consent — for optional features such as device location, which you can grant or revoke at any time; and (d) legal obligation — when we must respond to lawful requests.
privacy.processorsBody1: We use Supabase as our database, authentication, and file storage provider. Supabase processes data on our behalf as a data processor under GDPR Article 28; our project runs in the EU (Ireland) region. If you sign in with Google or Apple, those providers receive your sign-in event and the basic profile information you have agreed to share. We do not share your data with any other third party unless required by law or to protect the rights, safety, or property of TTPortal or its users.
privacy.storageBody1: User data is stored in Supabase, in the EU (Ireland) region. Backups are kept by Supabase under their data processing terms. Authentication sessions are stored in your browser's local storage; see our Cookie Policy for details.
privacy.rightsBody1: Under the GDPR you have the right to access the personal data we hold about you, to ask us to correct inaccurate data, to ask us to delete your data, to ask us to restrict or stop processing, to receive your data in a portable format, and to object to certain processing. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (in Romania, this is ANSPDCP).
privacy.rightsBody2: You can delete your account from inside the app at any time. This removes your profile, reviews, check-ins, and any content you have created. Some technical logs may be retained for up to 90 days for security.
privacy.retentionTitle: How long we keep your data
privacy.retentionBody1: We keep your account data for as long as your account exists. When you delete your account, we delete your data within 30 days, except for backups (which roll off within 90 days) and any data we are legally required to retain.
privacy.childrenBody1: TTPortal is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changesBody1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The date at the top reflects the most recent revision. If we make material changes, we will notify you in the app or by email before they take effect.
privacy.contactBody1: For privacy questions or to exercise any of your rights, email us at ttportal.info@gmail.com. We respond to GDPR requests within 30 days.

cookies.metaDescription: What TTPortal stores in your browser. We use no tracking, advertising, or analytics cookies.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: TTPortal uses your browser's local storage for a small number of essential and functional items. We do not use any third-party tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies. This page describes exactly what is stored, why, and how to remove it.
cookies.noTrackingBody: There is no Google Analytics, no Facebook Pixel, no advertising network, no session-replay tool, and no analytics SDK on this site. Because we do not store anything that requires consent under the ePrivacy Directive, we do not show a cookie consent banner.
cookies.whatWeStoreTitle: What we store in your browser
cookies.whatWeStoreBody: All items below are stored using localStorage (not HTTP cookies). They stay on your device until you clear them. Nothing here is shared with any third party.
cookies.rowAuthPurpose: Keeps you signed in. Without it you cannot use any logged-in feature.
cookies.rowLangPurpose: Remembers your language choice (English or Romanian).
cookies.rowCityPurpose: Remembers the last city you browsed.
cookies.thirdPartyBody1: Supabase handles authentication and stores its session token in localStorage on our domain. It does not set cross-site tracking cookies.
cookies.thirdPartyBody2: If you choose Sign in with Google, Google will set its own cookies on accounts.google.com during the sign-in flow. This is part of the OAuth process and only happens when you actively click the Google sign-in button. We do not embed any Google scripts on our pages.
cookies.clearTitle: How to clear what we've stored
cookies.clearBody: You can clear all the items above through your browser's settings, usually under "Site data" or "Cookies and other site data". Clearing them will sign you out and reset your preferences.

deleteAccountWeb.title: Delete your TTPortal account
deleteAccountWeb.intro: This will permanently delete your account and the data you've created on TTPortal. You can change your mind during a 30-day grace period before the deletion becomes irreversible.
deleteAccountWeb.whatProfile: Your profile — name, email, photo, and any settings you configured.
deleteAccountWeb.whatEvents: Events you organize and your RSVPs to events organized by others.
deleteAccountWeb.whatFriends: Your friends list and pending friend requests.
deleteAccountWeb.whatPhotos: Photos you uploaded to venues and check-ins.
deleteAccountWeb.gracePeriod: You have 30 days from when you confirm to change your mind. Sign back in to the app or this site within that window and cancel the deletion. After 30 days, your data cannot be recovered.
deleteAccountWeb.error: We couldn't process the request. Please try again.
deleteAccountWeb.signInRequiredTitle: Sign in to delete your account
deleteAccountWeb.signInRequiredBody: For your security, deletion requires a signed-in session. Sign in to the TTPortal web app, then return to this page.
deleteAccountWeb.doneMetaDescription: Your TTPortal account is scheduled for deletion.
deleteAccountWeb.doneIntro: Your TTPortal account is scheduled for permanent deletion in 30 days. You've been signed out from this device.
deleteAccountWeb.doneCancelHint: Changed your mind? Sign back in to the TTPortal mobile app or this site within 30 days and your account and data will be restored. After 30 days, deletion is permanent and irreversible.
